item.title: Japex unveils plan to quadruple production by 2035
item.description: Japanese player sets sights on upstream projects in US, Norway and Southeast Asia

item.title: Santos ‘ready to accelerate’ $2 billion offshore project
item.description: Energy security woes amid Middle East conflict put Dorado oil and gas development in the spotlight

item.title: Baker Hughes beats Q1 expectations despite oilfield services revenue drop
item.description: Overall haul grows by 2% as IET segment growth offsets OFSE decline

item.title: US oil executives foresee small production increase in response to Middle East war
item.description: Updated Dallas Fed survey airs frustration with ‘all of the chaos’ caused by US-Israel conflict with Iran

item.title: Geopolitics to remake Canada's oil sands from 'pariah to priority' analysts say
item.description: Oil sands output could expand by 1 million bpd in seven years, but more pipelines are needed

item.title: Iraq go-ahead for drilling plans at key oil asset
item.description: China's EBP Petroleum will drill more horizontal wells at the southern flank of East Baghdad oilfield

item.title: Sierra Leone gains another oil and gas investor
item.description: Nigerian independent Marginal Energy strikes exploration deal covering four blocks

item.title: BP chair weathers green revolt as key votes fall short
item.description: Green activist shareholders had called on investors to vote against Albert Manifold's election

item.title: Helix and Hornbeck agree to merge in all-stock deal
item.description: Transaction will create premier integrated offshore services company

item.title: Equinor hits market with rig inquiry for big Bay du Nord project
item.description: Contract due to start in 2029 and covers exploration and development drilling

item.title: Woodside prevails in spat over CEO pay
item.description: Gas was a front-burner issue at company's annual general meeting on Thursday, while chief executive's remuneration drew shareholder scrutiny

item.title: UK specialist wins important contract for planned floater
item.description: London Marine Consultants to provide external turret mooring system

item.title: Radio silence as Eni completes high-profile Libya exploration well
item.description: Offshore Matsola-1 well was drilled in Sirte basin

item.title: Russian oil flows to Hungary and Slovakia resume after three month halt
item.description: Deliveries restart after Ukraine completes long-awaited repairs on pumping facility damaged in January

item.title: QatarEnergy and ExxonMobil begin LNG exports from landmark US facility
item.description: The Golden Pass joint venture has loaded out its first LNG export cargo from the export facility in Texas

item.title: QatarEnergy and ExxonMobil begin LNG exports from new US facility as Qatar LNG still offline
item.description: The Golden Pass joint venture has loaded out its first LNG export cargo from the export facility in Texas

item.title: Equinor and Vaar team up for 'new concept' exploration well
item.description: Lakris prospect planned to be drilled in the third quarter

item.title: 'It doesn't get better than that': TotalEnergies and Petrobras' Namibia frontier prospect has huge potential
item.description: Multibillion-barrel structure identified in Luderitz basin block targeted by supermajor and Petrobras

item.title: BP chair faces crunch vote at AGM amid shareholder furore
item.description: BP will hold its AGM on Thursday at its Sunbury research centre in the UK

item.title: Key contracts awarded for Indonesia offshore gas project
item.description: Production start-up from Conrad Energy Asia’s Mako field on track for fourth quarter of 2027

item.title: Fresh delays at Qatar expansion megaproject amid Iran war uncertainty
item.description: Offshore logistics and procurement have been disrupted at the Strait of Hormuz, a vital shipping chokepoint, impacting regional EPCI projects

item.title: Woodside reaches settlement with Greenpeace
item.description: Parties agree to drop greenwashing court proceedings

item.title: Operator capitalising on favourable pricing in the rig market
item.description: Valeura Energy snaps up jack-up on long-term deal

item.title: Operator capitalising on favourable pricing in rig market
item.description: Valeura Energy snaps up jack-up on long-term deal

item.title: UK independent eyes new suitors
item.description: Takeover bid by Viaro Energy was shelved at beginning of April

item.title: Russia to pause Kazakh oil flows to Germany
item.description: Astana says halt to transit flows due to Ukraine drone strikes on Russian energy infrastructure

item.title: Oil futures misrepresenting scale of Iran supply shock for global markets, say leading traders
item.description: Historical disconnect building between soaring physical prices and financial markets

item.title: Weatherford sees light on horizon after revenues drop
item.description: Shutdowns in the Middle East sank Weatherford's quarterly earnings but the company is preparing for a post-war rebound

item.title: Saipem eyes Middle East repairs amid positive outlook
item.description: Italian contracting giant maintains outlook unchanged on hope of quick resolution of Middle East crisis, assures business is resilent

item.title: Shell captures vast reconnaissance licence offshore Sierra Leone
item.description: Exploration deal allows supermajor to carry out geological and geophysical studies across 19 blocks
